---
title: "03: Factors (Solutions)"
author: "Charlie Lindgren"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Solutions

```{r, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE}
# Solution to Exercise 1
education_levels <- factor(
  c("High School", "Bachelor's", "Master's", "PhD", "Bachelor's")
)
print(education_levels)

# Solution to Exercise 2
levels(education_levels)

# Solution to Exercise 3
education_levels_ordered <- factor(education_levels,
  levels = c("High School", "Bachelor's", "Master's", "PhD"),
  ordered = TRUE
)
print(education_levels_ordered)

# Solution to Exercise 4
movie_ratings <- factor(
  c("Good", "Great", "Good", "Excellent", "Good", "Bad"),
  levels = c("Bad", "Good", "Great", "Excellent")
)
print(movie_ratings)

# Solution to Exercise 5
students_df <- data.frame(
  student = c("Alice", "Bob", "Charlie", "Diana", "Eve"),
  grade = factor(
    c("A", "B", "C", "A", "F"),
    levels = c("A", "B", "C", "D", "F")
  )
)
print(students_df)

# Solution to Exercise 6
top_students <- students_df[students_df$grade %in% c("A", "B"), ]
print(top_students)
```
